triggers.name: update_equipment_timestamp
triggers.function: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_equipment_timestamp() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN NEW.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
triggers.trigger: CREATE TRIGGER trg_update_equipment_timestamp BEFORE UPDATE ON equipment FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_equipment_timestamp();

triggers.name: check_critical_parameters
triggers.function: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION check_critical_parameters() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN INSERT INTO alerts (sensor_id, equipment_id, alert_type, severity, description, threshold_value, actual_value) SELECT NEW.sensor_id, s.equipment_id, CASE WHEN s.sensor_type = 'PRESSURE' AND NEW.value < 6.5 THEN 'PRESSURE_LOW' WHEN s.sensor_type = 'TEMPERATURE' AND NEW.value > 100 THEN 'TEMPERATURE_HIGH' WHEN s.sensor_type = 'VIBRATION' AND NEW.value > 20 THEN 'VIBRATION_HIGH' WHEN s.sensor_type = 'DEW_POINT' AND NEW.value > -15 THEN 'DEW_POINT_HIGH' END, 'HIGH', 'Parameter exceeded critical threshold', CASE WHEN s.sensor_type = 'PRESSURE' THEN 6.5 WHEN s.sensor_type = 'TEMPERATURE' THEN 100 WHEN s.sensor_type = 'VIBRATION' THEN 20 WHEN s.sensor_type = 'DEW_POINT' THEN -15 END, NEW.value FROM sensors s WHERE s.sensor_id = NEW.sensor_id AND ((s.sensor_type = 'PRESSURE' AND NEW.value < 6.5) OR (s.sensor_type = 'TEMPERATURE' AND NEW.value > 100) OR (s.sensor_type = 'VIBRATION' AND NEW.value > 20) OR (s.sensor_type = 'DEW_POINT' AND NEW.value > -15)); RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
triggers.trigger: CREATE TRIGGER trg_check_critical_parameters AFTER INSERT ON sensor_readings FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION check_critical_parameters();

triggers.name: update_equipment_updated_at
triggers.function: BEFORE UPDATE ON equipment FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()

triggers.name: update_critical_parameters_updated_at
triggers.function: BEFORE UPDATE ON critical_parameters FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()

triggers.name: check_quality_compliance
triggers.function: BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON production_quality FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION check_quality_compliance()

triggers.name: generate_alert_on_threshold
triggers.function: AFTER INSERT ON sensor_readings FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION generate_alert_on_threshold_violation()

functions.name: update_updated_at_column
functions.definition: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN NEW.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; RETURN NEW; END; $$ language 'plpgsql';

functions.name: check_quality_compliance
functions.definition: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION check_quality_compliance() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF NEW.turbidity_ntu > 5 OR NEW.ph_value < 6.5 OR NEW.ph_value > 8.5 OR NEW.dissolved_oxygen_mgl < 2 THEN NEW.compliance_status = 'non_compliant'; ELSIF NEW.turbidity_ntu > 4 OR NEW.ph_value < 6.8 OR NEW.ph_value > 8.2 OR NEW.dissolved_oxygen_mgl < 2.5 THEN NEW.compliance_status = 'warning'; ELSE NEW.compliance_status = 'compliant'; END IF; RETURN NEW; END; $$ language 'plpgsql';

functions.name: generate_alert_on_threshold_violation
functions.definition: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION generate_alert_on_threshold_violation() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ DECLARE param_record RECORD; BEGIN SELECT * INTO param_record FROM critical_parameters WHERE parameter_name = (SELECT parameter FROM sensors WHERE sensor_id = NEW.sensor_id) AND is_active = TRUE; IF param_record IS NOT NULL THEN IF (param_record.min_value IS NOT NULL AND NEW.value < param_record.min_value) OR (param_record.max_value IS NOT NULL AND NEW.value > param_record.max_value) THEN INSERT INTO events_alerts (event_type, severity, description, source_type, source_id, parameter, value, threshold) VALUES ('threshold_violation', 'warning', 'Parameter threshold violation detected', 'sensor', NEW.sensor_id, param_record.parameter_name, NEW.value, CASE WHEN NEW.value < param_record.min_value THEN param_record.min_value ELSE param_record.max_value END); END IF; END IF; RETURN NEW; END; $$ language 'plpgsql';
